user_stories.benefit: I can get work done without scripting every step.
acceptance: Agent responds with progress and results

user_stories.goal: restrict agent access to specific folders
user_stories.benefit: I can keep the agent scoped to safe directories.

user_stories.goal: approve impactful actions on a per-thread basis
user_stories.benefit: I can review high-risk actions before they run.
acceptance: Pending approvals appear in Cowork Manager

user_stories.benefit: I can add external tools safely.
acceptance: Tools are available to the agent

user_stories.benefit: I can verify OAuth configuration quickly.
